title: Rug Grippers - 8 PCS Anti Curl Corner Grippers for Laminate, Wooden, Tiled Floors, Carpet Rug Corner Tape Grippers with Strong Grip Technology, Stops Rug from Curling and Slipping
features: SECURE RUG CORNERS WITH NEVERCURL RUG CORNER GRIPPERS - Tired of constantly adjusting your rugs? Our rug corner grippers instantly lock and flatten your rug corners to hold rug down in place, preventing slipping and curling. No more annoying rug corners that refuse to stay down!

STICKER ADHESIVE FOR ULTIMATE GRIP - Experience the benefits of our non-slip rug underlay that works like magic to stop your rug from moving on carpeted surfaces. Our innovative adhesive technology ensures a stronghold, keeping rug corners firmly in place. The renewable carpet gripper sticky gel provides a reliable bond without leaving any residue, so your rugs can be easily repositioned if needed.

EASY LIFT DESIGN FOR EFFORTLESS RUG CLEANING - Cleaning under your rugs has never been easier! Our rug corner grippers allowing you to lift and clean under your rugs without any hassle. Say goodbye to dirt and dust buildup beneath your carpets. No more dealing with loose or curled-up rug corners – enjoy a smooth and tidy look in your living space.

PACK OF 8 FOR COMPLETE RUG COVERAGE - Each pack includes 8 rug corner grippers, ensuring that all corners of your rug are held down securely. Specially designed for corners, these rug grippers effectively stop corners of rugs from curling, providing a neat and polished look to your living space. Our rug grippers blend seamlessly with any rug color, including black, enhancing the aesthetics of your space without compromising functionality.

SAY GOODBYE TO SLIPPING RUGS - With our rug grippers, you can finally enjoy a slip-free and well-maintained rug. Our rug corner grippers provide the perfect solution to keep your rugs in place, so you can walk and relax without worrying about tripping hazards or unsightly corners. The adhesive used in our rug grippers is floor-safe, ensuring that your floors remain undamaged while enjoying the benefits of a non-slip rug.
